question: How does seat-based billing work?
answer: You're billed for number of active seats (user accounts) in workspace. Removing user deactivates seat. Billing adjusts start of next billing cycle.

question: How to downgrade plan?
answer: Settings → Billing → Change Plan → select lower plan. Downgrades effective end of current billing period. No charge for unused time.

question: Can I get refund if I cancel?
answer: Annual plan customers eligible for pro-rata refund for unused full months if cancelled within 30 days of renewal. Monthly plans not refunded for current period.

question: Why was workspace suspended after failed payment?
answer: Workspaces enter 7-day grace period after failed payment. If not received within window, workspace suspended. All data retained 30 days after suspension.

question: How to update billing credit card?
answer: Settings → Billing → Payment Methods → Edit. Changes apply immediately to next billing cycle.

question: How to get copy of past invoice?
answer: Settings → Billing → Invoice History → select month → Download PDF. All invoices available from account creation date.

question: Do you offer non-profit or educational discounts?
answer: Yes. 30% discounts for verified non-profits and 50% for qualifying educational institutions. Apply via Settings → Billing → Discount Programs.

question: How does annual plan discount work?
answer: Annual plans billed upfront for 12 months at 20% discount versus monthly rate. Discount applied automatically at checkout when selecting annual billing.

question: How to apply tax exemption certificate?
answer: Settings → Billing → Tax Exemption → Upload Certificate. Once verified (typically 3 business days), tax removed from future invoices.

question: Why charged for feature add-on I didn't activate?
answer: Some add-ons have trial period after which they convert to paid. Check Settings → Billing → Add-ons for active add-ons. Contact support to dispute and remove.

question: How to set up multiple payment methods?
answer: Settings → Billing → Payment Methods → Add Method. Designate primary and backup payment method. Auto-pay uses primary.

question: Can I switch from monthly to annual billing?
answer: Yes. Switch anytime via Settings → Billing → Change Plan → toggle to Annual. Charged annual rate immediately, credited for unused days on current monthly cycle.

question: What happens to data if I don't pay invoice?
answer: After 7-day grace period, workspace suspended but data retained. After 30 days suspension, data deletion begins. Can reactivate anytime within 30-day window.

question: How to get W-9 or vendor form?
answer: Contact support with your company name and finance contact. We send completed W-9 or vendor form within 2 business days.

question: How are usage-based charges calculated?
answer: Usage charges (e.g., API calls, storage overages) calculated end of each billing cycle based on actual consumption. Usage breakdown in Settings → Billing → Usage.

question: Can I add PO number to invoices?
answer: Yes. Settings → Billing → Invoice Settings → PO Number. Appears on all future invoices. For past invoices, contact support.

question: What currencies supported for billing?
answer: We support USD, EUR, GBP, CAD, AUD. Currency set at account creation. Contact support to change — requires re-entering payment details.

question: How to cancel account entirely?
answer: Settings → Billing → Cancel Account. Prompted to confirm and given option to export data first. Cancellation effective end of current period.

question: Is there free tier available?
answer: Yes. Free tier supports up to 3 users with limited features. Upgrade to paid plan for unlimited users, advanced features, priority support.

question: Why does invoice show proration charges?
answer: Proration charges occur when upgrading mid-cycle. Charged only for remaining days of current cycle at new plan rate, minus credit for unused days on old plan.

question: How to dispute billing charge?
answer: Settings → Billing → Dispute Charge or contact support. Include invoice number and charge description. Disputes reviewed within 3 business days.

question: Can I get invoice in different currency?
answer: Invoices issued in billing currency. For different currency version, contact support — we provide converted invoice for accounting purposes.

question: What payment methods accepted?
answer: We accept all major credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover) and ACH bank transfers for annual plans over $1,000.

question: How to set up ACH payment?
answer: Settings → Billing → Payment Methods → Add ACH. Provide routing and account numbers. Verification micro-deposits sent, confirm amounts within 3 days.

question: Why was I charged sales tax?
answer: Sales tax applied based on billing address location where legally required. If tax-exempt, upload certificate in Settings → Billing → Tax Exemption.

question: Can I get detailed usage breakdown?
answer: Settings → Billing → Usage Details shows API calls, storage, bandwidth by date. Export CSV for detailed analysis.

question: How to enable spending limits?
answer: Settings → Billing → Spending Limits. Set monthly cap for usage-based charges. Services pause when limit reached to prevent overage.

question: What happens if payment fails on annual plan?
answer: You have 7 days to update payment method. If not resolved, workspace suspended. Annual commitment still applies — balance due upon reactivation.

question: Can I split bill across multiple cards?
answer: Not supported. Use single card for payment. Consider corporate card or reimburse submitter if needed for accounting.

question: How to get billing contact to receive invoices?
answer: Settings → Billing → Billing Contacts → Add Email. Invoices sent to account owner and all billing contacts.

question: Why do I see pending charge before bill date?
answer: Authorization hold placed 3 days before billing date to verify card valid. Actual charge processed on billing date.

question: Can I backdate a plan change?
answer: Plan changes effective immediately or scheduled for next cycle. Cannot backdate to prior periods due to billing system limitations.

question: How to get annual plan invoice at start of year?
answer: Annual invoices issued on billing anniversary. For calendar year invoice, contact support — we can adjust billing cycle once.

question: What's included in Enterprise plan pricing?
answer: Enterprise pricing custom based on seats, features, support level. Contact sales for quote. Typically includes SSO, advanced security, dedicated support.

question: How to get API key?
answer: Settings → Developer → API Keys → Create New Key. Store securely — shown only once. If lost, revoke and regenerate.

question: Why am I getting 401 errors on API calls?
answer: 401 means unauthenticated request. Verify API key included in Authorization header as 'Bearer YOUR_KEY' and hasn't been revoked.

question: Why am I getting 429 rate limit errors?
answer: You're exceeding API rate limit for your plan. Check X-RateLimit-Remaining header in responses. Consider batching requests or upgrading to higher-tier plan.

question: How to set up webhooks?
answer: Settings → Developer → Webhooks → Add Endpoint. Enter endpoint URL, select events to subscribe to, save. Test webhook using 'Send Test Event' button.

question: Webhook not receiving events. How to debug?
answer: Check webhook delivery logs in Settings → Developer → Webhooks → select endpoint → View Logs. Common issues: endpoint returning non-200 status or incorrect HTTPS configuration.

question: How to set up SAML SSO?
answer: Settings → Security → SSO → Configure SAML. Need IdP metadata URL or XML file. Full instructions in SSO setup guide at docs.ourapp.com/sso.

question: Dashboard loading very slowly.
answer: Slow dashboards often caused by large date ranges or many filters. Try narrowing date range. If persists across browsers and networks, contact support.

question: How to bulk import data via CSV?
answer: Go to relevant module → Import → Download Template → fill in template → Upload. Files must match template schema exactly. Max file size 50MB.

question: CSV export has corrupted characters.
answer: Character encoding issue. Open CSV in Excel using Data → From Text/CSV and select UTF-8 encoding. Or open in Google Sheets which handles encoding automatically.

question: How to integrate with Zapier or Make?
answer: We have native integrations with Zapier and Make. Search for our app in Zapier/Make app directory. API credentials (Settings → Developer) required to authenticate.

question: Mobile app not syncing with web.
answer: Sync delays up to 5 minutes are normal. Force sync by pulling down on main screen. If delayed by hours, log out and back in on mobile app.

question: How to set up two-factor authentication?
answer: Settings → Security → Two-Factor Authentication → Enforce for all users. Users prompted to set up 2FA at next login.

question: Why is data missing from reports?
answer: Reports use created_date field by default. If data missing, check date range covers when records were created. Verify no filters inadvertently excluding data.

question: How to migrate data from another platform?
answer: We provide migration tools for common platforms. Settings → Data → Migrate. For custom migrations, our solutions team offers assisted migration services.

question: What's maximum file upload size?
answer: Maximum file upload 100MB per file. For larger files, contact support about bulk data transfer options or API-based uploads which support up to 5GB.

question: How to generate and rotate API keys?
answer: Settings → Developer → API Keys. Click key name to view options including Rotate (generates new key, old stays valid 24 hours) and Revoke.

question: How to set up IP allowlisting?
answer: Settings → Security → IP Allowlist → Add IP Range. Only requests from allowlisted IPs accepted. Ensure you add all office and VPN IP ranges before enabling.

question: How to access audit log?
answer: Settings → Security → Audit Log. Filter by user, action type, date range. Audit logs available for past 12 months on Business plans, unlimited on Enterprise.

question: What are API rate limits for each plan?
answer: Free: 100 req/min. Starter: 500 req/min. Growth: 1,000 req/min. Business: 5,000 req/min. Enterprise: custom limits. All plans share 1M req/day cap.

question: How to enable debug logging for API?
answer: Add header 'X-Debug: true' to API requests. Debug logs available in Settings → Developer → API Logs for 7 days. Note: debug mode reduces API performance slightly.

question: Why is search not finding recent records?
answer: Search index updates every 5 minutes. Newly created records may not appear immediately. Force re-index in Settings → Data → Reindex (Enterprise only).

question: How to set up custom domain for workspace?
answer: Settings → Workspace → Custom Domain → Add Domain → follow DNS verification instructions. Propagation can take up to 72 hours.

question: API returning stale data. How to force refresh?
answer: Add query parameter ?cache=false to API request to bypass cache and get real-time data. Note: reduces API performance.

question: How to enable real-time notifications?
answer: Settings → Notifications → Real-time Updates → Enable. Uses WebSocket connection. Fallback to polling if WebSocket unavailable.

question: Bulk operations timing out.
answer: Batch operations have 5-minute timeout. Break large batches into smaller chunks (max 1,000 records per batch recommended).

question: How to export all workspace data?
answer: Settings → Data → Export → select data types → Start Export. Download link emailed when ready (typically within 1 hour for workspaces under 10GB).

question: Can I use API to create automated backups?
answer: Yes. Use GET /backup endpoint to trigger backup. Returns backup file URL. Automate via cron job or scheduled task. Rate limit: 1 backup per hour.

question: How to configure CORS for API requests?
answer: CORS enabled by default for all origins. For security, set allowed origins in Settings → Developer → CORS Settings → Add Domain.

question: GraphQL API available?
answer: GraphQL available on Business and Enterprise plans. Endpoint: /graphql. Documentation at docs.ourapp.com/graphql. Use same API key for authentication.

question: How to troubleshoot API errors?
answer: Check API error response for error code and message. Common codes: 400 (bad request), 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found), 429 (rate limit), 500 (server error). Full error reference at docs.ourapp.com/errors.

question: Can I self-host the platform?
answer: Self-hosting available for Enterprise customers only. Requires Docker/Kubernetes infrastructure. Contact sales for self-hosting package and support.

question: How to set up automated workflows?
answer: Use built-in Workflow Builder: Settings → Workflows → Create Workflow. Define triggers, conditions, actions. Or use Zapier/Make for external integrations.

question: Platform experiencing downtime?
answer: Check status.ourapp.com for real-time service status. Subscribe to status updates for email/SMS alerts during incidents.

question: How to invite new team member?
answer: Settings → Team → Invite Member. Enter email and select role. They receive invitation email valid for 7 days.

question: What user roles available and what can each do?
answer: Owner: full access. Admin: all settings except billing and ownership transfer. Member: access to workspace content. Viewer: read-only access. Custom roles available on Business and Enterprise plans.

question: How to set up SCIM provisioning?
answer: Settings → Security → SCIM → Enable. Copy SCIM base URL and bearer token into IdP (Okta, Azure AD, etc.). Users added in IdP automatically provisioned.

question: Invited user getting Access Denied.
answer: Usually caused by role assignment delay after SCIM provisioning or manual invite. Settings → Team → find user → verify role assigned correctly.

question: How to transfer workspace ownership?
answer: Settings → Team → find user → Transfer Ownership. You'll be demoted to Admin. New owner receives confirmation email.

question: How to deactivate user who left company?
answer: Settings → Team → find user → Deactivate. Seat freed at next billing cycle. User's data and activity history retained.

question: How to set up custom domain?
answer: Settings → Workspace → Custom Domain → Add Domain. Follow DNS verification instructions. Propagation can take up to 72 hours.

question: How to export workspace data for GDPR?
answer: Settings → Privacy → Data Export → Request Export. Download link emailed within 24 hours. Includes all user data, content, activity logs.

question: How to configure password policy?
answer: Settings → Security → Password Policy. Set minimum length, complexity requirements, expiry period. Users prompted to update password at next login if doesn't meet new policy.

question: Why audit log missing some actions?
answer: Audit log coverage depends on plan. Free and Starter log login and billing events only. Growth and above log all user actions. Enterprise offers full immutable audit logs.

question: How to enable SSO for workspace?
answer: SSO available on Business and Enterprise plans. Settings → Security → SSO and follow setup guide for your IdP. Test SSO before enforcing to avoid lockouts.

question: Can I restrict which countries can access workspace?
answer: Yes, on Enterprise plans. Settings → Security → Geographic Restrictions → Add Allowed Countries. Users from unlisted countries blocked from accessing workspace.

question: How to merge two workspaces?
answer: Workspace merges require migration team's assistance. Contact support with both workspace IDs to start process. Note: merges cannot be undone.

question: How to enable session timeout?
answer: Settings → Security → Session Management → set idle timeout period. Sessions automatically expire after specified period of inactivity.

question: How to set up email domain allowlist?
answer: Settings → Security → Domain Allowlist → Add Domain. Only users with email addresses from listed domains can be invited to workspace.

question: How to manage team permissions?
answer: Settings → Team → select user → Edit Permissions. Set granular permissions for modules, features. Custom permission sets available on Business and Enterprise.

question: Can I create workspace templates?
answer: Yes. Settings → Workspace → Templates → Create Template. Save workspace structure, settings, content as template for new workspaces.

question: How to enable activity monitoring?
answer: Settings → Security → Activity Monitoring → Enable. Tracks user actions, login times, IP addresses. View reports in Settings → Security → Activity Reports.

question: What happens to data when user deactivated?
answer: User's created content remains in workspace, attributed to deactivated user. Personal files moved to workspace shared drive. Can reactivate user within 30 days to restore access.

question: How to set up multi-workspace access?
answer: Users can be members of multiple workspaces. Switch between workspaces using workspace dropdown in top navigation. Each workspace has separate billing, data, settings.

question: Can I clone workspace for testing?
answer: Yes. Settings → Workspace → Clone Workspace. Creates exact copy including data, users, settings. Useful for testing changes before applying to production workspace.

question: How to configure user onboarding?
answer: Settings → Workspace → Onboarding → customize welcome message, setup checklist, resource links. Shown to new users on first login.

question: How to manage API access per user?
answer: Settings → Team → select user → API Access → enable/disable. Can also set user-specific API rate limits on Enterprise plans.

question: Can users have different roles in different workspaces?
answer: Yes. User permissions are workspace-specific. Someone can be Admin in one workspace and Viewer in another.

question: How to enable guest access?
answer: Settings → Security → Guest Access → Enable. Guests have limited permissions, can't access sensitive settings. Useful for clients, contractors.

question: What's the difference between deactivate and delete user?
answer: Deactivate: user account preserved, can be reactivated, data retained. Delete: user account permanently removed, cannot be recovered, data deleted or reassigned.

question: How to set up approval workflows?
answer: Settings → Workflows → Approvals → Create Approval Flow. Define approval chain, conditions. Users notified when approval required.

question: Can I export list of all users?
answer: Settings → Team → Export → CSV. Includes name, email, role, status, last login, date added.

question: How to enable login alerts?
answer: Settings → Security → Login Alerts → Enable. Receive email when login from new device or location. Helps detect unauthorized access.

question: How to configure data retention policies?
answer: Settings → Privacy → Data Retention → set retention period for different data types (messages, files, logs). Automated deletion after retention period expires.

question: Can I recover deleted user account?
answer: Deleted users cannot be recovered. Deactivated users can be reactivated within 30 days. After 30 days, deactivated users are permanently deleted.

question: How to enable workspace-level encryption?
answer: Settings → Security → Encryption → Enable at Rest Encryption. All data encrypted using AES-256. Available on Enterprise plans.

question: How to manage user groups?
answer: Settings → Team → Groups → Create Group. Add users to groups, assign group-level permissions. Simplifies permission management for large teams.
